## Validation

<!-- List the exact commands and manual checks you ran. -->

- [ ] I added or updated relevant tests, or explained why tests are not needed.
- [ ] I updated affected documentation, configuration examples, and API contracts.
- [ ] I regenerated and committed Proto or Web artifacts when required.
- [ ] I included sanitized screenshots when the change affects the user interface.
- [ ] I did not include real records, credentials, API keys, databases, attachments, or other sensitive data.
- [ ] I have read the [Contributing Guide](https://github.com/getsillage/sillage/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) and agree to follow the [Code of Conduct](https://github.com/getsillage/sillage/blob/main/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).
